data.name: TestConnectionDesc
data.value: Executes an immediate network handshake check using the current draft parameters without altering production.

data.name: ApplyChangesDesc
data.value: Applies the draft configuration parameters to the active 24/7 background worker execution thread.

data.name: ResetHistoryDesc
data.value: Clears out the entire local transfer log cache database. Warning: This causes previously uploaded files to be re-transmitted.

data.name: ConnectionSuccess
data.value: SFTP Connection diagnostics successful. Remote directory verified.

data.name: DeploymentSuccess
data.value: Configuration successfully deployed to active production environment.

data.name: DeploymentFailed
data.value: Cannot deploy configuration. Handshake verification failed first.

data.name: ResetConfirmMsg
data.value: Are you absolutely sure you want to completely erase the database log history? This cannot be undone and will trigger re-transfers.

data.name: ResetSuccessText
data.value: Transfer log history cache successfully dropped from database.
